step_rationale: Local inflammatory mediator at rupture; modifies HDL; systemic inflammation.
mechanism: SAA is a major acute-phase protein elevated at plaque rupture, modifies HDL-mediated reverse cholesterol transport and amplifies vascular inflammation.
